user.title: Configure DHL API
user.description: Enter your API key and secret from the DHL Developer Portal. For username and password use your DHL app / www.dhl.de (Meine DHL) credentials. In sandbox mode these fields can be left empty – official DHL test credentials will be used automatically.

data_description.api_key: Found at: developer.dhl.com → Your App → Authorization → Consumer Key
data_description.api_secret: Found at: developer.dhl.com → Your App → Authorization → Consumer Secret
data_description.api_type: Parcel DE Tracking recommended for Germany
data_description.gkp_user: Same credentials as the DHL app or www.dhl.de
data_description.gkp_password: Same credentials as the DHL app or www.dhl.de
data_description.sandbox: Enable while API status is 'Customer Integration Testing'

error.invalid_api_key: Invalid API credentials – check Consumer Key and Secret
error.invalid_gkp_credentials: Invalid DHL username or password – use the same credentials as the DHL app
error.missing_gkp_credentials: DHL username and password are required. Leave empty in sandbox mode.
error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to DHL API – check internet connection
error.unknown: Unknown error – check the logs for details

abort.already_configured: DHL Shipment Tracking is already configured

data_description.tracking_number: Full DHL tracking number without spaces
data_description.label: e.g. 'Amazon May' – used as sensor name
data_description.postal_code: For complete location and address data

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Update interval in seconds. Minimum: 600 s (10 min).

error.invalid_tracking_number: Tracking number is too short or invalid
error.tracking_already_added: This tracking number is already being tracked
